name: Sales Follow Up Email
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Sales Follow Up Email Add-on"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the marketing section find the Sales Follow Up Email add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Default order date field used in follow up email", "bold": true}, {"text": "- Choose the date to use for the follow up email. Must be one of Date Paid, Date Placed, Date Required, Date Invoiced or Default."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Number of days to send order follow up email", "bold": true}, {"text": "- Enter the number of days from when the order was shipped what you want the followup email to be sent."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Send follow up email for first order only", "bold": true}, {"text": "- Prevents follow up emails for each order a customer places."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Order type allowed to send follow up email", "bold": true}, {"text": "- The order types you wish to send follow up emails to. Select all to send to all order types."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Customer group allowed to send follow up email", "bold": true}, {"text": "- The customer groups you want to send follow up emails to. Select all to send to all customers\u00a0(Requires the"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/693-customer-groups", "children": [{"text": "Customer Groups add-on"}]}, {"text": ")."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set when a follow up email is sent, and who they go to:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ERebCMAT.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000ERebCMAT.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Sales Follow Up Email2.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to complete the set up."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": To change how the email looks see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1107-customise-email-and-print-templates#10", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": ". The template for this email is stored on the file server here: "}, {"text": "/private/www/netosuite/SysDoc/emails/order/followup/", "bold": true}, {"text": ", or in the control panel under "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Email Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Order Emails", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Order Follow Up Email", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]
